description: Returns information about an objective in the AWS Control Catalog.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the objective.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the objective.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 36  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws(?:[-a-z]*)?):controlcatalog:::objective/[0-9a-z]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ObjectiveId.description: The unique identifier of the objective.
ObjectiveId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the objective.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-z]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the objective.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the objective.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Domain.description: The domain that the objective belongs to.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the related domain.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the related domain.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

Name.description: The name of the related domain.
